extortion.description: [AI generated] Univ-rennes.fr is likely associated with the University of Rennes, a renowned public research university located in Rennes, France. Offering a wide range of studies, it is divided into two main sectors: University of Rennes 1, focusing on science, technology, medicine, philosophy, law, management, and economics, and University of Rennes 2, emphasizing arts, literature, languages, communication, human and social sciences.
